entry.title: Re: MS Azure AD as a data source for SAP GRC AC 12 | Azure AD Cloud & GRC Integration

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now error: configuration file could not be...
entry.content:
Hi Hoang,

Did you manage to find a solution? I recently had a similar issue with some objects, although the error mentioned a 'lesson.js' instead of the 'entity.txt'. I did a mix of trying to create a duplicate and publish it again, opening the object for editing (simulations, in my case) and entering preview mode from the Producer and clearing the context field in the Manager and filling it again with the screenID it had previously.

I'm not sure which one of these worked, if any, but I'd like to know if you tried something similar and if you found any pattern for this behavior.

Kind regards,

João

entry.title: GW logging report shows only entries from solman system and no other servername details
entry.content:
Hello All,

Customer wants to identify which servers are communicating with the Solman system.

Using this information, they plan to add only those servers to the secinfo or reginfo or ms_acl_info files to mitigate security vulnerabilities.

we have updated the following parameters in the Solution Manager system
gw/sim_mode = 1
gw/logging = ACTION=SPXER LOGFILE=gw_log-%y-%m-%d SWITCHTF=day MAXSIZEKB=100
gw/acl_mode = 1

We completed CHARM setup for S4HANA system and the Managed System Configuration for ABAP and Java systems in SOLMAN system.

however the generated GW logging report shows only entries from Solution manager and no other connection details shows.

SLD_UC, SLD_NUC,ISG_SID only these entries

1.Why are no other connection details visible in the GW logging report? 
2.How can we identify these connection details and Please confirm whether we should add the identified server names to the secinfo or reginfo or ms_acl_info?

Regards

Appuru

entry.content:
Hello good morning

Can you help me create a case since when I want to edit the detailed description it does not allow me to edit, please help.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU

entry.title: SF Stories
entry.content:
Hi
We are not yet using Reporting Stories but I would like to understand whether it would have the capability of illustrating Time Account balances in a bar chart sjowing splits of balances parameters.  For example, where those with a balance of between 0-20 days would be shown as yellow and those with 21+ days  as red in the graph?

Thanks.

entry.title: Multiple ODQ-subscriptions for unique subscriber
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I am currently working on a project to extract Data from S4 to Azure Datalake Storage using Azure Data Factory. I have set everything up as I think it should be using the SAP CDC linked service, including a unique subscriber name. Further I have selected the option for initial full load and afterwards incremental. 

If I process the Dataflow it works as intended. Also when I create some test-data in our SAP-System, I can load the deltas just fine. After a few hours however, when I run the Dataflow again SAP provided me with a initial full load again. I checked the ODQMON transaction and noticed that I have two active subscriptions for my subscriber name. So it seems, that the ODP Framework adds a separate subscription from time to time, that forces me to load all the data again. Has someone had a similar issue and can give me some advise on how to get the system to use the existing subscription rather than creating new ones?

Thanks a lot

Ivo

entry.title: Re: I want to Export/download all the data of my GSTR1 RA...
entry.content:
@AR77 ,

Thanks. Can we know how are you exporting the data is it via custom application with Extract to Excel Functionality or via service ? Please let us know to check 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/new-excel-export-functionality-available/bc-p/13385885 

Best Regards,

Sri

entry.title: SAP S4/HANA Embedded EWM Configuration - Blog - step by step Guide - Put away strategy
entry.content:
Introduction:

This may be Old. But will be useful. After configuring the WPT we need to define the strategy for placing the product to the respective bin automatically while creating the warehouse task in inbound delivery. Each time we will not manually select the put away bin. Here, I would like to explain the put-away strategy. For org structure please have a look into the previous Blog 

Overview:

The put-away strategy will be made at three levels.

  1. Storage type level.
  2. Storage section level.
  3. Bin Level.

Configuration - 1. Storage type level

Define Storage Type Search Sequence for Put away

It's just a description of the search sequence

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Goods Receipt Process - Strategies - Storage Type Search - Define Storage Type Search Sequence for Put away

Assign Storage Types to Storage Type Search Sequence

It's just a table where we can map the search sequence with storage type.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Goods Receipt Process - Strategies - Storage Type Search - Assign Storage Types to Storage Type Search Sequence

Here I have assigned the storage type to the search sequence. 

Define Put away Control Indicator

Its just combination of Put away control indicator and storage type search sequence.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Goods Receipt Process - Strategies - Storage Type Search - Define Put away Control Indicator

Specify Storage Type Search Sequence for Put away

Its a table which maps the warehouse number with put away indicator, process type, Search sequence...

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Goods Receipt Process - Strategies - Storage Type Search - Specify Storage Type Search Sequence for Put away

Optimize Access Strategy for Storage Type Search: Put away

Its a table which prioritize the selection of search sequence if we have multiple combination in above config.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Goods Receipt Process - Strategies - Storage Type Search - Optimize Access Strategy for Storage Type Search: Put away

Now the configuration is done. 

Master data. 

We will map the put away control indicator to the material master in EWM - /n/SCWM/MAT1

Create a Bin via /n/SCWM/LS01

Transaction data or Process:

Now create the purchase order in ME21N and create the inbound delivery in VL31N.

Then go to /n/SCWM/MON to get the inbound document. Do GR for the document and then create the Warehouse task. Then click on logs to see the details. Here you can see that the put away strategy has been identified. By which the destination BIN also determined.

Note: Put away rule - In storage type we have this indicator.

2 - Addition to existing stock will be used when you are placing the material to bin where the stock is already there or empty bin.

4 - General Storage Area & 6 - Transit warehouse are commonly used for Staging area where no BIN will be there but its a place or location.

5 - Empty bin is used only when we need to put the materials to bin which is empty.

Configuration - 2. Storage Type level:

Define Storage Sections

Its sections in Warehouse and which need to be described in System.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Master Data - Define Storage Sections

Create Storage Section Indicators

Its just a name to used to map the storage section and in terms assigned to the material master.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Goods Receipt Process - Strategies - Storage Section Search - Create Storage Section Indicators

Maintain Storage Section Search Sequence

Its just a table where you can map the storage section indicator to the storage type and section with sequence. Also you can use different storage type and section for same section indicator.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Goods Receipt Process - Strategies - Storage Section Search - Maintain Storage Section Search Sequence

In storage type you have to do one extra configuration. This will consider the storage section check and determination.

Master data:

Two Method:

a. Assign section indicator in Warehouse data view.

In /n/SCWM/MAT1 we need to map the storage section indicator to the material. The Put away control is also to be maintained. This will first determine the Storage type. Then the section indicator will help to find the section.

b. Assign section indicator in SL type data view.

Also you can maintain the same in storage type data view of material master. Maintain the storage type and Section indicator and at last click adopt data. 

Note: Either a or b is enough

Storage Bin

I have kept the storage section only for one bin in /n/SCWM/LS11. So now the last bin should be selected.

Transactional Data:

Now create the warehouse task to check weather its working or not. At first the put away control determine the storage type. Then later the section indicator used to determine the section.

If I am not maintaining the storage section indicator then system is not getting the 

Configuration - 3. Bin Level

Define Storage Bin Types

These are just names used to indicate bin types like cage, Pallet or Tote. See more in Link 

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Goods Receipt Process - Strategies - Storage Bin Determination - Define Storage Bin Types

Alternative Storage Bin Type Sequence

This is a table which maps the primary storage bin type and alternative storage bin type to the storage type.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Goods Receipt Process - Strategies - Storage Bin Determination - Alternative Storage Bin Type Sequence

Here the system will check the CAGE bin type for doing put away. If its not there then it will put away the material to Pallet storage location.

Master data:

Material Mater: - Two Method:

A. Storage bin Indicator in Warehouse data view

Maintain the Storage bin type in Ware house data of Material master - /n/SCWM/MAT1. I have removed the Section indicator. 

Note: Also removed the Section check in Storage type configuration.

B. Storage bin Type in Storage type data view

Maintain the Storage type and Bin Type in storage type view of material master.

Note: Either a or b is enough

Storage Bin:

/n/SCWM/LS11 - Have maintained one bin with bin type Pallet. So here the system will put the material to ROD1-01-03-02.

Transactional Data:

Later create inbound delivery and  do create the warehouse task. System here check the bin type 'CAGE' first. As there are not bin with type CAGE its moved to second sequence 'Pallet'

Conclusion:

I hope this will make you to understand about the strategy process.
Please comment your thoughts.

entry.title: Freight Unit is not created automatically for Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Freight unit is not generated automatically for sales order. (Embedded TM S4 Hana 2020 version)

When sales order is created, "TM Status" tab is created, but no Freight Unit is created.

I have created FUBR & maintained FUBR in logistics integration profile and LIP maintained in the Logical Integration-Internal TM Component - Activate Integration of SD Documents.

Kindly advise what could be the issue and how to resolve it?.

Note: There is no blocks found.

Thanks,

Krish

We have received the Productive Tenant, how can we add the Business Roles on this system?

entry.title: Re: How to handle a server busy popup
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

Finally, found the solution for my issue, Please find ''3363390 - Server Busy error when opening web transactions using SAP GUI Edge HTML browser control". 

Installing the SAP GUI extension from the browser has solved it.

Thanks,
Sai Tharun

entry.title: Re: Add Business Roles to P-System
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

The authorization concept must be defined and handled by the System Administrator. In order to move the Business Roles to P-System, you have two options:

> Download and Upload: You can download one or more business roles from the source system and then upload them to the target system using an XML file.

Check SAP Help Portal | How to Download and Upload Business Roles for more details.

*Please do not modify the XML file on your hard drive before uploading it to the target system. This can lead to technical issues.

 

> Transport the roles: You can use the Export Software Collection app and the Import Collection app to transport business roles from your source system to your target system. 

Check SAP Help Portal | How to Import and Export Business Roles for more details.

*We recommend that you do not change the business role after it has been transported. It should not be changed locally but only updated with a new transport. Local changes should only be carried out in urgent cases.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Error while processing Proxy request in soap to proxy interface in Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am currently testing a soap to proxy scenario for which I'm getting an error 'org.apache.cxf.binding.soap.SoapFault: Error during conversion of XI message'. I have also found a detailed error after enabling the trace:

<detail><SAP:Error xmlns:SAP="http://sap.com/xi/XI/Message/30" xmlns:SOAP="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" SOAP:mustUnderstand="1"><SAP:Category>XIProtocol</SAP:Category><SAP:Code area="PARSER">UNEXPECTED_VALUE</SAP:Code><SAP:P1>Main/@versionMinor</SAP:P1><SAP:P2>001</SAP:P2><SAP:P3>000</SAP:P3><SAP:P4/><SAP:AdditionalText/><SAP:ApplicationFaultMessage namespace=""/><SAP:Stack>XML tag Main/@versionMinor has the incorrect value 001. Value 000 expected </SAP:Stack></SAP:Error></detail>

 

Can anyone please let me know why this below error is generated and how this can be resolved.

Thanks,

Aditya

Hello, community,

I followed the steps mentioned in the readme of https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-cap-samples , but this led to an error. Is it just me or am I missing something?

 

 

 

 

user: cloud-cap-samples $ cds --version

@cap-js/asyncapi: 1.0.2
@cap-js/openapi: 1.0.4
@cap-js/sqlite: 1.7.3
@capire/samples: 2.1.0
@sap/cds: 8.0.4

@sap/cds-dk: 8.0.3
@sap/cds-dk (global): 8.0.3
@sap/cds-fiori: 1.2.7
@sap/cds-foss: 5.0.1
@sap/cds-mtxs: 2.0.3
@sap/eslint-plugin-cds: 3.0.4
Node.js: v20.12.0

entry.title: Where can I start learning consolidating investments with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Consolidating Investments with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting learning journey

Overview
Understand how to maintain the investment structure and ownership data, configure the activity-based purchase and equity methods for first and subsequent consolidation, run consolidation of investments and evaluate the log entries, and report on the results and analyze the impact on the investment, equity, goodwill, non-controlling interest, and earnings amounts.

Learning objectives
Comprehend and practice how to maintain the investment structure and ownership data, configure the activity-based purchase and equity methods for first and subsequent consolidation, run consolidation of investments and evaluate the log entries, and report on the results and analyze the impact on the investment, equity, goodwill, non-controlling interest, and earnings amounts.

Prerequisites

  • Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! 
We are here to support you. I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano My name is Nikita Agrawal. I identify myself as a Women who is looking for a reentry in the professional world after a career break. I have worked in the SAP space for around 6 years with an expertise in ABAP, SAP SD, SAP MM modules. I am interested to upgrade my skills and learn about SAP Ariba Procurement. 

This Digital Skills Initiative would provide me with that platform to hone my skills and get certified, hence I am willing to sign up for this program.

entry.title: Re: Error while processing Proxy request in soap to proxy...
entry.content:
Sounds like you are running your message with version 1.1 but it is expecting 1.0 -

<?xml version = "1.0" encoding = "UTF-8"?>

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: National Ice Cream Month - what flavor will you choose?
entry.content:
Hi all - yesterday, Sunday, July 1, National Ice Cream Day was celebrated kicking off 1 'month' of ice cream celebrations!! Hopefully you had ice cream to commemorate such a yummy holiday and plan to eat ice cream all month. Don't forget your dog's ice cream treat too!

I chose coffee ice cream! 🍨

I'm guessing @Kartik_Dua may say mint chocolate chip!!

What flavor did you choose?

entry.title: Vulnerability report of Crystal Reports for Visual Studio SP36
entry.content:
I run the Vulnerability report of my product that uses Crystal Reports for Visual Studio latest Support Pack SP36, and several Critical and High severity issues were found (see packages with their versions below). Can you advise how these vulnerability issues can be eliminated?

The report finds very old versions of some packages - it is very strange to see them in the latest SP.

 

PackageVersionModulesSeverityVulnerabilities
libicu3.0crdb_p2ssyb10.dll, icuin30.dll,  keydecoder.dllcriticalCVE-2015-5922, CVE-2016-6293, CVE-2017-17484
libicu3.0crdb_p2ssyb10.dll, icuin30.dll,  keydecoder.dllhighCVE-2011-4599, CVE-2014-7923, CVE-2014-7926, CVE-2014-8146, CVE-2014-8147, CVE-2015-5922, CVE-2016-6293, CVE-2017-17484, CVE-2017-7867, CVE-2017-7868, CVE-2020-10532
libicu3.4icuuc30.dllcriticalCVE-2014-9654, CVE-2014-9911, CVE-2015-5922, CVE-2016-6293, CVE-2017-17484
libicu3.4icuuc30.dllhighCVE-2011-4599, CVE-2014-7923, CVE-2014-7926, CVE-2014-8146, CVE-2014-8147, CVE-2017-7867, CVE-2017-7868, CVE-2020-10531
libicu4.4icuin42.dllcriticalCVE-2014-9911, CVE-2015-5922, CVE-2017-14952, CVE-2017-17484
libicu4.4icuin42.dllhighCVE-2014-7923, CVE-2014-7926, CVE-2014-8146, CVE-2014-8147, CVE-2017-7867, CVE-2017-7868, CVE-2020-10531
libicu4.2.1icuuc42.dll, icudt42.dllcriticalCVE-2014-9911, CVE-2015-5922, CVE-2016-6293, CVE-2017-17484
libicu4.2.1icuuc42.dll, icudt42.dllhighCVE-2011-4599, CVE-2014-7923, CVE-2014-7926, CVE-2014-8146, CVE-2014-8147, CVE-2017-7867, CVE-2017-7868, CVE-2020-10531
libjpeg9acslibu-3-0.dllhighCVE-2020-14153
libtiff4.5.1cslibu-3-0.dllhighCVE-2023-52355
openssl1.0.2fsapcrypto.dllcriticalCVE-2016-2177, CVE-2022-1292, CVE-2022-2068
openssl1.0.2fsapcrypto.dllhighCVE-2016-8610, CVE-2022-0778, CVE-2023-0215, CVE-2023-0464
zlib1.2.12boezlib.dll, zlib.dllcriticalCVE-2022-37434, CVE-2023-45853

entry.title: Re: Calling a SOAP API using Postman
entry.content:
Nice discussion. Has anyone more infos reg. Postman and soamanger? I am currently stuck on the topic and get different messages form the soamanager runtime trace regarding formats or soapactions. It looks like I can not work with parameters in postman and have to do it as raw xml. But the xml is not supported. Anyway by debugging the correct class named in the soamanager log I know where the error comes from but I have no idea how to pass in the right way the action and part of the values.

did anyone of you succeeded now?

br

entry.title: Where is info about purchasing/downloading "Enterprise Connect Data Access" ?
entry.content:
Looking at 

  • SAP Replication Server -> Replication Server Heterogeneous Replication Guide -> SAP Replication Products -> Enterprise Connect Data Access (ECDA)

It says "Enterprise Connect Data Access (ECDA) products are Open Server-based software gateways"

I'm interested in exploring this for use with Microsoft SQL server, but when I go to the SAP Store, nothing is found for "Enterprise Connect Data Access" (link)

Is it possible to download and evaluation copy of this?  If so, where is the download page?

Thanks
Ben

We may not be able to add busines scenarios in the below screen. But another option is that to check if there exist BADI for copy control in this context, but i am afraid in this business context of sales/product..

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/copying-controls-what-are-they-and-how-do-they-work/ba-p/12856292

Best Regards,

Sri

entry.title: Re: Part 1 - Prerequisites and Setup Instructions for Datasphere BW/4HANA Model Transfer
entry.content: @senthurshree - In what ways is the BW/4HANA Model Transfer connection different from BW Bridge space?

entry.title: Handling bulk EDI documents from trading partners.
entry.content:
Hello All

I have a requirement where in our partner currently sends invoices (810) in EDI X12 format. These invoices come in bulk, meaning several invoices are bundled together in one single EDI file. Our current B2B system has the capability to split them and convert them into individual IDOC's. Can I achieve this using BTP (Cloud Integration). After some searching, I came across the documentation for EDI splitter. Can EDI splitter be the solution to accomplish this use case. Can this be used to handle incoming invoices in bulk. 

Have anyone tried this scenario using the BTP cloud integration. Please share your thoughts. 

Thank You.

Vijhay D.

entry.title: Re: Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in SAP C...
entry.content:
Hi! 

1010171 SSCUI ID is scope (1J2) dependent. Due to missing scope item (1J2) you are not able to see and do the configure for setting up your statutory reporting in the CBC system through 100171 SSCUI ID.

 

Please refer the KBA 3287422 for more information regarding SSCUI 101071 Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting is missing in CBC.

 

Suggested component for activate 1J2 scope item ---->>>>> XX-S4C-OPR-SRV

You need to open a case for this team.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: New PA is not visible V_001P_N
entry.content: Try with transaction SU01  user id in the parameters tab maintain MOL = your country grouping.

entry.title: Re: Getting error while extending additional sales area i...
entry.content: Have some custom logic and we fixed it. Thank you.

entry.title: How to create a Background Job for creating Production Plans in S&OP Based on Target Stock Level
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project where I need to create a background job for creating production plans in SOP for many materials based on the target stock level. 

In the SOP screen_ MC87_ I can create a production plan based on the target stock level for only one material as shown below. (We are not using the Products group).  

 

The Target stock level is entered manually for each material, now I want to create a background job to do the same for many materials. We are using standard SOP.

Could anyone provide detailed steps, and if possible, screenshots to guide me through this process?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Regards, 

Anderson CM.

SAP Disclosure Management SAP Funding Management

entry.title: Can someone please advise me on how to download MICR E13B 2.1?
Re: Handling bulk EDI documents from trading partners.
entry.content: Yes, the EDI splitter can handle the splitting of bulk messages.

Dear KhaingZin, 


These are the only options to download...

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: How do we dynamically add or map link in forms create...

Do we need any particular step before the form or it is still a new feature and needs to be updated for my Tenant. It would be really helpful if you can guide me if I am missing something here Thank you

entry.title: Can i create 1 physical inventory document for more than 4 storage locations
entry.content: Can i create 1 physical inventory document for more than 4 storage locations

entry.title: Process Chains - Start an S/4 job only after successful completion of IBP Application Job Template
entry.content:
Hi,

The context here is to try and schedule an S4 job only upon successful completion of an IBP job. Is this possible within the "Processes" of IBP itself?

Alternatively, is this possible from the standard S/4 HANA CLOUD or BW/4HANA Process Chains (RSPC)? Perhaps utilize CI-DS? Or is an external scheduling tool such as Redwood always needed?

Kind regards,
V.

entry.title: Re: RAG with SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine, GenAI Hub & CAP
entry.content:
Hi @KevinR. Great blog!

I can get the loader working fine, as it calls getEmbeddings() in the cap-llm-plugi, but handles the db insert in the CAP services.

However, when I try to run getRagResponse() or  similaritySearch() I get this error...

{
    "error": {
        "code": "500",
        "message": "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'run')"
    }
}

This occurs because, although the database (cds.db) is bound and connected on startup and in the CAP service, the connection (or the context) of cds.db is somehow lost from within the cap-llm-plugin.

Not really a workaround, but if I force the connect to the db again in the onit of the cap-llm-plugin. it works! Howvever this change is obviously overwitten on an npm install so not an option.

class CAPLLMPlugin extends cds.Service {
  async init() {
    await super.init();

    cds.conntect.to('db')
  }

 Using the lastest version of the cap-llm-plug, (1.3.3) and following the step in the README.

SAP-HANA Cloud and AI-CORE are hosted on one BTP account, with SAP Business Application hosted on another. Not sure if this a factor.

I am able to call the db, get the embeddings insert into the db and run the search (with the mod to the cap-llm-plugin) so it looks like everything is setup ok.

Any thoughts on this? Being able to easiliy integrate CAP, SAP HANA Cloud and AI-Core would greatly benefit future AI projects. 

Thanks a lot.

Adam

entry.title: Tab strip Wizard issue
entry.content:
Hi i am using a Module Pool Program, In Module Pool Program I use Tab strip Wizard for 4 tab in 2nd tab i created a Push Button in subscreen after click on that button It goes to Tab 1. 
what is the issue in it?
I want Click in tab 2 in tab 2 subscreen there is a button when i click on that push button call the transaction code. 
Please Guide me.

Thank U..

entry.title: Re: #CoE#HSEQ How to add new bank data of the existing BP?
entry.content:
Hi @frankyangm,

I suppose you tried to work with the entire content of the Knowledge Transfer Document that you shared. However, you may need to work with "Update" operation for the BusinessPartner and "Create" only for the Bank segment of that business partner. 

Also, I wonder about the context of your question: To update Business Partner Master Data programmatically we'd want you to use the released and published APIs. Id this for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition? If so, please have a look at the SAP Business Accelerator Hub at Business Accelerator Hub / SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition and navigate to API, OData V2, and find the Business Partner API. From there, look for the bank segment with its POST and PATCH methods, SAP Business Accelerator Hub / SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition / Business Partner / Bank Segment. 

Let me know if you need further support, or mark this question as solved, if you don't mind. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Handling bulk EDI documents from trading partners.
entry.content: Thank Ryan! Does BTP cloud integration have the capability to combine all the resulting IDOC's into one single document.

entry.title: Re: Best Approach for Master Data Integration from Succes...
entry.content:
Hi @anildeep7 , thank you for your question. Please approach integration among members of the SAP Cloud Business Suite, like S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SuccessFactors, Ariba, etc. from a business perspective through the respective integration sope items. You find scope items in the SAP for Me application in the process navigator, here. For the respective scenario in question, I believe you may want to be looking at scope item JB1 (adjust for your region as needed). There, you'd find the exact response to your question:

"As of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2308 release, the standard way of integrating SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central is via SAP Master Data Integration. Details are available on SAP Help Portal for SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Master Data Replication Using SAP Master Data Integration.

This scope item is only to be used if special reasons prevent you from using the standard way." For further details please consider the links provided.

If this solves your request please mark it as resolved. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I hope this comment finds you well.

My Name is Mahmoud, I'm writing to you today to express my keen interest in pursuing a career in SAP and to request your assistance in obtaining an exam code to validate my skills and enhance my employability in this field.

I'm currently enrolled in the SAP Professional Consultant course on Coursera and am actively seeking opportunities to expand my knowledge and expertise in the SAP ecosystem. I'm particularly fascinated by the SAP Signavio Process Data Analyst role and believe that obtaining a certification in this area would significantly strengthen my professional profile.

Unfortunately, due to financial constraints, I'm unable to afford the official exam fee at this time. I understand that you may have access to exam codes, and I would be incredibly grateful if you could consider providing me with one.

I'm confident that obtaining this certification would open doors to new career opportunities and allow me to contribute meaningfully to the SAP community. I'm a dedicated and passionate learner with a strong work ethic, and I'm eager to demonstrate my capabilities in the SAP domain.

entry.title: Re: Email Triggering for Preventive Maintenace Order(On c...
entry.content:
Thank you for your question, @Shadab_Hussain.

You may want to investigate this question further by assessing output management in conjunction with Change  Records and possibly Key user Extensibility. Please check the SAP Help documentation here, and adjust for the current product version if later than 2402. 

Please mark this request as solved or get back to me and the community with follow-up requests.

entry.title: Listing without DC or store.
entry.content:
Hello Fellows, 

Can you help me understand if listing can be done without creating any physical or virtual Store or DC?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Intelligent Clinical Supply Management : Setup & Configuration
entry.content: Hi @vshenoy1976, You need to install "S4 LIFE SCIENCES ADD-ON".

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Connectivity With S/4 HANA System & SAP Analytics Cloud : Technical Configura
entry.content:
Hi @fraseggar,

For SAP RISE Private Cloud you need to raise a SR to connect and configure the Data Provisioning Agent and need to provide the below details in SR-

• Agent name
• HANA server (host name)
• HANA port
• HANA username for agent messaging
• HANA user password for agent messaging

entry.title: Re: Accept/Reject Operations in SAM while EAM_PHASE_MODEL...
entry.content:
Hi, see my response in Red regarding your issues:

But while sync we are facing below issues. 

  1. Update UserStatus only from SAM - Sync Failed and transaction error is “Mobile Status is mandatory”. You should only be updating the Mobile Status from the app. The backend logic will update the user status accordingly.
  2. Update existing Mobile Status (Ready) & UserStatus from SAM App - Sync failed, and transaction error is “Mobile Status ‘Ready’ not supported”. Why are you updating the mobile status as Ready? As per your earlier comments you are trying to Accept or Reject.
  3.  Update Mobile Status & User Status from SAM App - Sync Successful, In backend Only Mobile status updating but not user status. And in trace we can see the record of UserStatus as well as MobileStatus as mentioned in below snapshot. You should only update the mobile status. What user status is the STARTED mobile status mapped to in the Configuration Panel?

entry.title: Re: Where is info about purchasing/downloading "Enterpris...
entry.content:
Have you contacted your SAP sales/support rep, or tech support, about this?

If you have a tech support contract I'm assuming the SRS PAM would confirm what, if any, versions of MS/SQL are (still) supported ... ?

Heterogeneous rep agent support (ie, source/primary database == Oracle, MS/SQL, DB2) dried up years ago (last available repagent version was 15.7.1 SP211).

While maintaining heterogeneous DSI support (ie, target/replicate database == Oracle, MS/SQL, DB2) may be less technically involved, I can't find any indications in the manuals that Sybase RepServer (SRS) supports the latest versions of Oracle, MS/SQL, DB2.  For years SAP has merely copied the contents of manuals with no eye towards updating the contents in the manauls; case in point: SRS 16.0 SP04 PL06, Quick Start Guide for SAP HANA Database, MS/SQL Prerequisites: supports Microsoft SQL Server 2008 or 2012 (should be updated with latest MS/SQL versions or removed if no longer supported).

If SAP is telling you that ECDA (to MS/SQL) is still supported, maybe they can provide a link to some up-to-date documentation?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

This is Usman here. By profession I am associated with the banking industry and looking forward to expand my skills and knowledge particularly in SAP. I have strong understanding of business processes due to my extensive experience in the corporate sector and banking industry which I believe would help me in learning and switch my career to SAP.

I would like to advantage of the wonderful opportunity of Digital Skills Initiative to take a step ahead in my learning journey. 

Looking forward to hear back from you

Kind regards,

entry.title: Re: BAPI/ FM to load Customer master data with Data services
entry.content:
Hi @Yuvaraj_M , depending on your S/4HANA Cloud product, if it was private cloud (or on premise) it would probably be S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (or on premise) | Overview | Business Partner (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub; if it was the Public Edition, the API is S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | Overview | Business Partner (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub. 

If this answers your request please mark as solved.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to change the Offer Letter Name in Manage Documents?
entry.content: This was very helpful thank you so much!

entry.title: Barefoot College International: Using In-House Tech Applications to Bolster Women Trainee’s Skills
entry.content:
Barefoot College International’s (BCI) mission is to offer marginalized women educational opportunities that will bring them and their communities greater prosperity and autonomy. One of their flagship initiatives, the solar engineering program, puts technology and hands-on skills at the fingertips of women with few local options for meaningful employment. Their latest efforts involve the use of digital technologies and AI assistance to monitor skill levels to match trainees with appropriate and fulfilling job roles.

Teaching women who have received minimal to no formal education is a strategy that aims to narrow the gender disparity in rural communities through financial and digital inclusion, where often females are the last chosen to get to attend school. Many barriers, including being from large families where the boys are selected first to receive education, and marriage and childbearing, can stop girls from getting an education. Studies have proven that introducing more women to the workforce boosts international GDPs by tens of trillions of dollars. Educating women and girls also empowers them to make informed personalized decisions including planned parenthood and healthier lifestyle choices.

BCI selects women from remote rural villages regardless of their age; the majority of trainees are between the ages of 35 and 60. Paired with their level of prior education (if any), a wide spectrum of capacities and skills can be present in a single cohort of women who are training. Recognizing this, their latest in-house designed applications help gather information to monitor trainee’s unique potential. Collecting data around each individual’s skill set enables the non-profit to place women in roles best suited for them.

This same data can assist BCI with tailoring its programming to regionally relevant, age-specific and other accessibility needs. Digital literacy and entrepreneurial skill-building are integral components of the curriculum that each woman receives during training, which is coupled with the solar engineering program. The use of technology can also assist in incorporating relevant livelihoods and bolster their operations. It can accelerate the progress of trainees’ skills and success through adaptability and accessibility. In addition, financial literacy and leadership skills help to foster a sense of agency and aspirations. 

Acknowledging the spectrum of skills and proficiencies that each trainee may have, the digital applications and AI assistance can aid BCI in discerning which women are suited to certain roles and entrepreneurial avenues. For example, some of their trainees will become Solar Mamas, responsible for installing and maintaining solar home lighting systems for their local communities. Other alumni become master trainers, excelling in teaching the solar curriculum and managing training centers. Some women graduate and pursue a role in the sales of solar products. 

In conclusion, the assistance of AI technology has improved the outcome of women-centric initiatives that largely rely on technological tools and skills. Digital savviness, a key component of the programs, is conclusively forward-thinking for a future that will continue to involve technology in everyday life and professionalism. Bridging the digital divide for marginalized rural communities by and through women is the first step towards global equity. 

To donate to this great organization, visit their website.

Check out the recent research from the SAP SuccessFactors HR research team:

  • Four approaches to making skills a reality in your organization: Whitepaper and storyboard
  • Winning the Race for Skills with Skills-Based Hiring
  • Workplace POV: Skills become center of people practices. What’s new?

entry.title: Re: Customer to Supplier Expansion LTMC/DATA MIGRATION
entry.content:
Hi @joanaferreira1 , 

you may be able to use the superordinate Business Partner API for the purpose you articulated.

  • For S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (or on premise) use this API: S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (or on premise) | Overview | Business Partner (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub, 
  • For S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition use this API: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | Overview | Business Partner (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

In either case, in the API Reference, on the left-hand side of the screen, look for the supplier segment. 

If this solves your request please mark as solved.

entry.title: Impact of Common Super Domain Rollout to SuccessFactors Joule Setup
entry.content:
Over the past few months, I've been working with SAP SuccessFactors customers to help them setup Joule in their landscape.  I've created a Discovery Center Mission which provides detailed instructions on how to setup Joule in SAP SuccessFactors through a guided flow and which also incorporates the best practices of the Joule setup process.  Many of customers have used the mission to setup Joule in SAP SuccessFactors, but majority of those customers have not yet migrated their SuccessFactors instance to use the Common Super Domain (CSD).  For more information on the Common Super Domain migration in SAP SuccessFactors, refer to this guide.  The purpose of this blog is to document the changes that will have to be made to the existing Joule setup for those customer who will migrate their SuccessFactors instance to the Common Super Domain.   Changes are required in the following areas following CSD migration:

  • Update SAP BTP destinations to use the new Common Super Domain URL of SAP SuccessFactors.
  • Update SAP BTP trust setup with SAP Cloud Identity Authentication Service(IAS) to use cloud.sap domain.
  • Update trusted domain settings in SAP BTP.

Updates to BTP Destination

To update the BTP destination, follow the steps below:

  • Access BTP Cockpit URL.
  • Select your BTP Global Account and navigate to the subaccount where Joule is setup.
  • Click the pencil icon to edit LPS_SFSF_rt destination.
  • Update the URL field in the destination to the use the new CSD URL for your SuccessFactors instance and Save your changes.  If you are unsure of what URL to use, see the SuccessFactors documentation that lists if the Pre and Post CSD migration URLs for different SuccessFactors instances.
  • Confirm the URL field in the destination is updated to show the CSD based URL for your SuccessFactors tenant.

Update BTP Trust with SAP Cloud Identity Authentication

The BTP trust setup between the Joule subaccount and SAP Cloud Identity Authentication may also require an update.

  • In the Joule subaccount, click on Trust Configuration and validate if the trust configuration with SAP Cloud Identity Authentication is already (as is the case in the screenshot below) using cloud.sap domain.  If so, there is no change required and the remaining steps in this section can be skipped.
  • If the trust is setup using ondemand.com then click the pencil icon to edit the configuration.
  • Click Next.
  • From the Domain dropdown switch from ondemand.com to cloud.sap and click Next.
  • Click Next again and click Finish.

Update Trust Domain Settings

The last step in the process is to update the trusted domain settings in BTP subaccount.

  • In the Joule subaccount, click on Settings and click Add.
  • Specify the CSD URL of your SuccessFactors instance and click Add.
  • Confirm the domain is successfully added.

Once these changes are made, you can start to use Joule again on a SuccessFactors tenant that's been migrated to Common Super Domain.

entry.title: Re: PR Attachment not visible in PO (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi @namdeo, 

the reasoning for different system behavior based on the origin of a PR/PO is segregation of duties: Within the purchasing department users authorized to process PRs and POs might be allowed to see the originating the attachment, and therefore it may be carried forward along some of the steps in the procurement process. The sales department' authorization usually do not cover purchase orders, and vice versa. 

You may be able to overcome this restriction by assigning business roles of both sales and procurement to a user. Alternatively, you may be able to use key user or developer extensibility to achieve the desired outcome. Either way, please make sure though that compliance requirements are upheld and verified by your compliance officers. 

if this solves the request please mark accordingly.

If this solves

entry.title: Re: Where is info about purchasing/downloading "Enterpris...
entry.content: I have not contacted tech support asking what, if any, versions of MS/SQL are (still) supported. I guess I was assuming that, if the product still is listed in the help pages, it was still active. Maybe a bad assumption. I'll contact tech support and post results back here

entry.title: Re: Credit check and ATP Issue
entry.content: Thanks for share this!

entry.title: I have a requirement to assign more than 1000 ship to parties to a single sold to party
entry.content:
I have a requirement to assign more than 1000 ship to parties to a single sold to party.

SAP has a limitation as it allows only until 999 ship-to parties since  KNVP table has partner limit with max 3 digits only.

anyone had similar requirement, Appreciate any help or provide inputs to address this requirement.

We already reviewed multiple address functionality in S4HANA which can be leveraged, but that is not available in current version of SAP IS-Oil solution.

entry.title: SAP DMC Edge
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to expand my knowledge in the area of SAP Digital Manufacturing (DM) and learn more about SAP DMC Edge. I'm particularly interested in:

  1. Implementation Experiences: Has anyone implemented SAP DMC Edge in their organization? I would love to hear about your experiences, challenges, and successes.
  2. Webinars and Resources: Are there any recommended webinars, articles, or other resources that provide detailed information about SAP DMC Edge?
  3. Features and Limitations: I am looking for a detailed list of features, limitations, and interfaces available in SAP DMC Edge.
  4. Custom POD Examples: Does anyone have examples of custom PODs that were developed for specific industries or use cases? Seeing practical implementations would be incredibly helpful.

Thank you in advance for any insights or resources you can share!

entry.title: Custom checks to Business Partner external number
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

Due to a request from our client, we need to implement some custom checks in the Bussines Partner number (BUS000FLDS-PARTNER) when creating a new bp.
This is the scenario: for certain groups, it is necessary to have a nomenclature that cannot be handled just with a range, so we need to validate it manually.
We already use the DCHCK event to check the number before saving, but we need to implement the validation in runtime when the group is selected, so the message can be displayed when pressing "enter", without saving or entering anything other than the grouping and partner number.
To achieve this, I tried to follow the steps on this post:
SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Implement Custom Fi... - SAP Community
It works completely fine for all fields, except header fields. For some reason the FM that are included in further checks of views BUP010 (bp number) and BUP020 (grouping) are not getting called (I put a breakpoint and it never stops). Is this a normal behavior?
So, the questions are: How can I perform these custom verifications for the business partner number field when creating a new bp? Is there a way to achieve this using BDT or is it necessary to implement some badi?

Thanks in advance.
Regards.

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: Here's my submission. That was a great learning experience.

entry.title: Asset Inventory Management Foundational to Effective Security Governance
entry.content:
By Daniel Müller, GCID Asset & Configuration Management Lead, and Jay Thoden van Velzen, Technical Advisor, Office of the CSO

Whenever we meet cybersecurity vendors, inevitably during the solution demo, we get to integration with ticketing systems, team communication platforms, source code repositories, and other channels to share alerts and findings with relevant teams. Fantastic. But how does the solution know who to send the alert to?

A common theme in cybersecurity is that you can’t protect what you don’t know you own. But there is a second order problem that you can’t protect what you own if you don’t know who is responsible for it. This is why asset inventory management is foundational for any effective security governance.

 

A Significant Challenge

SAP manages 1,000,000s of cloud resources across hyperscalers and internal data centers, and we continuously add more as more customers adopt our cloud solutions. These cloud resources are often short-lived, ephemeral in container-based workloads. But we also cycle daily through 100,000s of virtual machines. Every day there are 10,000s of new hosts in the environment, and 10,000s that no longer exist. Teams within SAP create, modify, and delete cloud resources at will, causing high velocity in the landscape.

SAP went through a significant cloud transformation. At the start of Next Generation Cloud Delivery in October 2020, over half of cloud resources were deployed in legacy data centers and co-location facilities. Today, over 95% of SAP’s cloud resources are deployed in public cloud or SAP’s own OpenStack-based Converged Cloud.

With 21 Lines of Business (LoB), 100s of developer-, DevOps-, and operations teams, and over 30,000 developers, many of whom orchestrate cloud resources in one way or another, SAP is organizationally complex. Determining who is responsible for a particular cloud asset, and what role it plays in the landscape, is not trivial. Different teams providing infrastructure and platform services to application teams further complicates that. Yet, being able to determine function and ownership, as well as relationships of assets to other assets, is foundational to several organizational functions:

  • Financial Management/FinOps
  • IT Service Management (ITSM)
  • IT Operations Management (ITOM)
  • Observability and Event Management
  • Demand & Capacity Management
  • Sustainability
  • Product Development
  • Security & Compliance

In this article, we will dig into SAP’s cloud asset inventory management, or Configuration Management Database (CMDB), and how it enables security and compliance governance processes.

 

CCIR – SAP’s CMDB

Information and relationships of IT systems, assets and networks are generally held in a CMDB. SAP’s internal CMDB is the Central Configuration Item Repository (CCIR). This self-developed application by the Cloud Infrastructure Data Engineering (CIDE) team following SAP runs SAP provides full overview and transparency of SAP's cloud in one central system. CCIR acts as a unique and reliable source for all cloud components, and their relationships to each other.

The CIDE CCIR team collects data from a variety of data sources, both central services and LoB specific, that scan the cloud landscape. This includes central asset discovery and information about and from the identified resources. The data is normalized, validated, and enriched with organizational metadata and business systems to add attributes providing business context. It is then stored in a well-structured data model, enabling the mapping between cloud infrastructure, applications, customers, and services in a single system. The designed and established CCIR Service-to-Service Data Model which is industry-wide new is key for the understanding SAP’s Cloud to fulfill the SAP requirements.

Access is then provided to internal stakeholders to support the organizational functions listed above.

Each individual asset or configuration item is represented as a separate CCIR object. Each object is of a particular object type – one out of 35 – and has a unique identifier across the estate. Relationships between assets are clearly defined and based on CCIR object types. These include service, cloud account, system, application, database, cluster, service, storage, and network. IP addresses and other configurations associated with the asset are stored as CCIR object attributes.

Each CCIR object has an owner who is responsible for the asset. It also has an associated cost object, which determines who pays for the asset, an organizational hierarchy from team to board area, and operational contacts. This information must be kept up to date. Teams that fail to do so can have their access to cloud resources locked until the required metadata is confirmed, which has proven effective.

The biggest challenge for the CCIR team was to develop a solution that could manage the multiplicity and complexity of the technologies, LoBs, and products in the company. Many of these technologies are infrastructure and platform services that are unique to SAP. A single landscape can span across multiple teams with assets maintained by different owners and connected to yet other parts of the architecture.

CCIR displays the relations between assets in a visualization graph. This helps to understand the structure of complex systems in an easier-to-understand format. There are views to represent landscapes from different perspectives, including an interactive one that displays additional indirect relationships to other assets and networks.

Example graphical landscape view – note: dummy data

Security and Compliance Governance

The asset information from CCIR directly supports key security and compliance functions. The results from security and compliance scans from central security services are enriched with the CCIR metadata for the associated assets.

Organizational Accountability

Having a security solution in place is not sufficient. You must send alerts to those able to act and fix the problem. For instance, when a new vulnerability is announced publicly, we look up where the vulnerable software is deployed and notify those responsible to patch assets. For known vulnerabilities and infrastructure misconfigurations, we automate distribution of alerts to the relevant teams to address.

Since vulnerabilities and misconfigurations are associated with the organizational hierarchy, we can roll up and report on them from board areas down to business units and teams. This brings governance and oversight to hold organizations to account and ensures transparency across managerial layers. Managers set priorities, not developers. Central tracking ensures that security alerts are made a priority, and even creates some competition among teams to perform well.

Compliance Automation

CCIR enables compliance automation. Through central scans, SAP assesses the policy compliance posture of the landscape and distributes and reports on the results via central pipelines enriched with CCIR data. This saves teams significant time collecting data and evidence.

The reporting informs teams early of any issues and facilitates tracking to goals. This has made our cloud infrastructure policy compliance and vulnerability management programs more efficient and effective.

Security Event Management and Threat Detection

CCIR also enriches the data feeds into the Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) system and improves the threat detections running on it. SAP structures detections along the MITRE ATT&CK® and D3FEND™ frameworks that help track events across different stages of a cyber attack. Alongside the correlation between security events and configuration, the CCIR metadata provides greater understanding of attack paths, and how far a malicious actor is along the event chain towards compromise, lateral movement, command and control, and data exfiltration.

Security Incident Response

CCIR enables security incident response when a series of events or reported security incident tickets trigger an alert for the security operations center (SOC). Being able to quickly assess the potential impact or blast radius of the incident supports triage and determination of priority and severity.

The associated operational and security contacts for assets involved in the incident speeds up the response by bringing the correct teams together for remediation. The CCIR metadata informs what the landscape type is, whether it contains customer data or not, and what other landscapes may be at risk that the event is connected to. The incident could be simple for a single developer sandbox test account. It is more complex when it involves infrastructure, platform, application, and corporate IT teams. If it includes a customer system, it triggers notification processes.

Risk Management and Prioritization

A key benefit of CCIR is that it allows SAP to determine the business value of assets, with environmental, architectural, and organizational context. This context and business value enables determining the relative risk associated with the asset and prioritize security and compliance alerts.

Different security scans and events have different risk profiles. Port scans reported by a well-configured firewall are low-risk events indicating little more than someone scanning for open ports. Vulnerabilities are rated depending on several conditions, as in the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS). Finding malware on systems indicates that an attack is in progress or may already have occurred.

But it is equally important where the affected asset is situated in the larger landscape. What its purpose is, and what other systems it relates to. The business value further informs the risk profile when evaluating the severity and priority of the security event within its wider context. The same vulnerability found in a public-facing service or several layers in the landscape unreachable from the outside poses a different risk. Exploitation of that vulnerability in a short-lived container-based microservice in a well-configured cluster is of a different risk profile than exploitation on a long-living virtual machine with access to critical business or personal data. Security events in isolated landscapes with test data carry a different risk than events in control plane infrastructure that manages cloud services.

That doesn’t mean we only respond to high-risk events. But it makes the difference between an alert notification or an issue raised in a ticketing system, or assigning an Escalation Manager and getting 24x7 response teams on a bridge call.

 

Confidential Resource Asset Management

A new challenge came up during the operationalization of Sovereign Cloud services. The secrecy requirements and localized operations mean that asset information must be kept secret and only made available to those with the appropriate clearance. Yet, as much as possible SAP wants to leverage central services and integrations that already exist. Since all security events are enriched and contextualized with CCIR data the key source to solve this problem is in CCIR.

CCIR provides restricted areas with additional data protections to ensure regulatory compliance. Only employees with granted permissions are allowed to see or consume the restricted data for Sovereign Cloud CCIR objects. All data is collected as normal and it has all the CCIR features for reporting but is only available for teams in restricted areas.

Minimal hashed attributes exist so automation in central services can redirect data to the Sovereign Cloud organization in a secrecy-preserving way, where data is remapped to the appropriate restricted area and teams with access to the restricted attributes.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano

I'm excited to express my interest in the SAP Digital Skills initiative! As a woman looking to re-enter the workforce after taking time off as a stay-at-home mom, I'm eager to regain my professional footing. With a degree in Finance and a strong passion for learning, I'm confident that this program will equip me with the in-demand skills I need to confidently jump back into the industry.

My professional background in finance, combined with the SAP certification, will enable me to build a strong skillset.

I look forward to the opportunity to kickstart a career in the SAP Ecosystem.

Best regards,
Hazel

entry.title: Re: Where is info about purchasing/downloading "Enterpris...
entry.content:
Here's the answer I got from tech support (end of mainstream maintenance for 15.7 is Dec 2024. No version 16 planned):

Info for Customer

ECDA DOWNLOAD

0002245005 - How to download MainframeConnect DirectConnect (DC) and EnterpriseConnect Data Access (ECDA)

SYBASE ECDA/
SYBASE ECDA 15.7/
SYBASE ECDA SERVER 15.7

For Example .. The latest ECDA for Linux :  ECDASERV157005_0-10013374.TGZ EBF 25402: 15.7 SP05

See also
0002261962 - How to install and configure EnterpriseConnect Data Access (ECDA) ODBC Option with MS SQL Server  https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/ssmap/3362972868.html

ECDA EOL & SUPPORT

ECDA 15.7 ==>   End of Mainstream Maintenance:    31.12.2024
There is no version 16.0 planned currently.

Details for Product Version SYBASE ECDA 15.7
End of Mainstream Maintenance:    31.12.2024

After EOMM,  Tech Support maintenance will be available, but that does NOT include bug fixes or certifications. Otherwise, 
The software package may not be displayed because you do not have license to download ECDA.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
Hi Stephanie,

I am ready to post my blog under ERP SAP communtiy but dont have authorization says ACCESS DENIED when i try to create the blog.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
Hi Katherine,

I did complete the Tour the SAP community 2024.Still it does not allow me to create.

entry.title: Re: Can i create 1 physical inventory document for more than 4 storage locations
entry.content: You can create a physical inventory document for all locations using transaction MI31 for mass creation. The program will automatically generate a physical inventory document for each storage location, but it will group the same storage location into a single physical inventory document..

entry.title: Re: Can i create 1 physical inventory document for more t...
entry.content: You can create a physical inventory document for all locations using transaction MI31 for mass creation. The program will automatically generate a physical inventory document for each storage location, but it will group the same storage location into a single physical inventory document.

entry.title: Re: How should the correct definition of "Range&quot...
entry.content:
The IF-Condition from the second example is missing in the first one, so when IV_WERKS is empty your range will contain one row with I EQ and an initial value.

Add that IF-Condition there and it should work, too.

The "ranges"-keyword from the second example is deprecated and you should go for the first one with "type range of"

entry.title: CM25 PP/DS - in ECC Prior to S/4 Migration
entry.content:
We are exploring PP/DS in our business, and one of the first steps is to utilize the ECC EHP8 system transaction CM25 to optimize setup capacity and schedule based on a constraint work center.

As a result, I have been challenged with a few questions. May I request some assistance here as my experience with CM25 is not that robust, and locating information about it seems to be limited via SAP help or other SAP training resources due to the many new technologies in FIORI being deployed for PP/DS and S/4?

  1. Does anyone have a listing of color codes for the CM25 bar graphs that illustrate what each standard color code means?
  2. Can these color codes be adjusted or changed for different business purposes without enhancement, and if so, how can they be adjusted? 
  3. I have also been asked to enhance the grid display in the tabular bar graph format. Are there any available instructions on how to add fields to this grid display?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Can i create 1 physical inventory document for more t...
entry.content: Yes i know that but my requirement is to group all storage locations in 1 PI Document

entry.title: Re: Replication of Valid User name from SF EC to SAP S/4 or SAP ERP in case of Multiple Employments
entry.content:
Hi Prakash,

I also have the same issue with multiple employments, in your previous comment I am not able to see the screen dumps. 

Could you please share the code?
 
Thanks,

entry.title: SAC - Calculated Dimension in Modeler
entry.content:
Greetings,

Does the possibility exist to create a calculated dimension in the modeler itself similar to how we can create calculated dimensions in stories?

The drawback with calculated dimensions in stories is that they are not accessible to other stories or in the excel add-in.

The drawback with calculated columns in import jobs is that if parameters are updated, a reload of historical data is needed, so it's pretty static.

Is there another option to have the following with changing attribute members and not needing to reload historical data?

1. New dimension 3 calculated based on the below logic:

  1. If attribute 1 of dimension 1 is not blank, attribute 1 of dimension 1. Else
  2. If attribute 1 of dimension 2 is not blank, attribute 1 of dimension 2. Else
  3. dimension 

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Re: Extractor for Table AFVC, AFPO, AFKO
entry.content:
May I recommend taking a look at the object navigator in transaction SE80.   Go to Package: CO, and open up the logic database folder.   There are prebuild SAP logical database packages that have multiple table and field data base relationships built in.

Hope this provides some assistance in the search for a solution.

entry.title: Re: Kyma upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers.
entry.content: Did you get past this? I am getting the same issue.

entry.title: Re: Can i create 1 physical inventory document for more t...
entry.content: PI or physical inventory at the IM level is going to be by stock location no way to get around that requirement. Depending on your business process, you may want to evaluate WM - warehouse management, this will enable you to simplify the IM structure possibly down to a single stock location and simplify the number of physical inventory count documents created.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework
entry.content:
Hi @AndreasPoth,

I'm unaware of the use case of successful SAP EAF implementation. Is there any? S.Kotusev did the independent research about others. 

If the framework is still emerging, would be more fair to say that there is a group of people dedicated to testing certain ideas and hypotheses until they are proven in real life. Otherwise, many of us have an illusion that just by following the framework or templates, enterprise architecture work could be done.

People tend to simplify a problem to the point that a known method could be applied to it. Simplified problem is not original problem. Therefore, frameworks could even be harmful if applied without greater accountability for the outcome. We should be more aware of our contribution to the development of EA practice.

entry.title: Withholding Tax Type for Invoice Posting
entry.content:
Good afternoon
SAP experts

I enabled the extended tax withholding functionality 



However, when configuring the withholding types I only have the option enabled:Tax withholding type for payment posting.


I need to know where to configure the one that corresponds to: Withholding Type for Invoice Posting.

In SAP S4HANA it was configured in this route:


But in SAP S4 CLOUD PUBLIC I cannot find the path indicated above, I attach an image:


Thank you for your attention and help.
Greetings.
